ethnicity_or_visual_type: White American, fair skin, sun-kissed look
face_description: Rectangular face with defined jawline, blue eyes, light stubble, natural relaxed smile showing teeth, slightly tanned complexion
hair_description: Sandy blonde/light brown curly hair, medium length, tousled and messy, sticking out under cap
voice_type: Casual, young, laid-back American male, slightly surfer-dude energy
emotional_baseline: Chill, genuine, slightly excited when sharing discoveries
wardrobe_range: Casual streetwear: oversized white/plain tees, hoodies, baseball caps, shorts. Skater/surfer adjacent. No formal wear.
default_camera_behavior: Talks to camera like making a casual TikTok. Holds phone or mic. Natural, not rehearsed. Occasional hand gestures.
realism_rules: Must look like real phone-shot content. Natural outdoor or indoor lighting. Slightly overexposed outdoor shots are fine. Real environments, not studio.
forbidden_deviations: Adding facial hair beyond light stubble
Removing cap in scenes where it was established

locked.eye_structure: Blue eyes, relaxed gaze, natural brow
locked.mouth: Medium lips, natural smile showing upper teeth
locked.identity_anchor: Young American guy, blue eyes, sandy blonde curly hair, rectangular face with jawline, light stubble, relaxed smile, wearing baseball cap and oversized white tee, casual surfer-adjacent vibe
